---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the scenario where it would be useful.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could be implemented (optional).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (optional).

## Additional Context

Any additional context, references to OPC UA specification sections, or examples from other libraries.
